summary: Single short-entry mean-reversion fade using funding, taker_buy_ratio_5m, and move_pct — all T0-observable supported fields with no leakage; advisory monitoring concerns only.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All three novel_dim fields (funding, taker_buy_ratio_5m, move_pct) are point-in-time observables at T0. No forward_*, post_event_*, or confirm_after_* references. funding rates are published on a known schedule and taker_buy_ratio_5m is a trailing 5m window (backward-looking), not forward. move_pct is the trigger magnitude itself.
risk_assessments.multitest_inflation_notes: Among 94 existing short entries on pricechange channel, this is the first to combine funding sign with taker-flow imbalance as a crowding fade. Three orthogonal supported fields reduce family-wise overlap rather than inflate it.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: User runs BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long live. This proposal is a SHORT on pricechange pump events — opposite side. Symbol overlap is plausible during a pump that satisfies both channels' triggers, producing simultaneous long (live) and short (paper) positions on the same name. Paper-shadow only, so no real hedging conflict, but flag for monitoring.
risk_assessments.remediation: Paper-shadow only; log any concurrent same-symbol overlap with the live pump-long strategy in the daily monitor so the user can eyeball cross-strategy correlation. No code change required.
